# flashblade_array_smtp (Data Source)

Reads the current SMTP relay configuration and alert watchers of a FlashBlade array.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_array_smtp" "example" {}

output "smtp_relay_host" {
  value = data.flashblade_array_smtp.example.relay_host
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `alert_watchers` (Attributes Set) Set of alert watcher email recipients. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--alert_watchers))
- `encryption_mode` (String) SMTP encryption mode: 'none', 'tls', or 'starttls'.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the SMTP server configuration.
- `relay_host` (String) Hostname or IP address of the SMTP relay server.
- `sender_domain` (String) Domain appended to the sender email address.

<a id="nestedatt--alert_watchers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `alert_watchers`

Read-Only:

- `email` (String) Email address of the alert recipient.
- `enabled` (Boolean) If true, this watcher receives alert notifications.
- `minimum_notification_severity` (String) Minimum alert severity that triggers a notification.
